title: Super Mario Kart
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Racing game.

A short stocky cartoon racer in a tiny kart with a simple cap and overalls silhouette in a bright Mode 7-style track bend with bold curbs, coins, and drifting dust, sliding through the turn with the kart angled dramatically across the lane.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- SNES aesthetic, rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and readable 16-bit atmosphere
- always rendered as pixel art
- crisp pixel edges, readable sprite-like shading, and controlled dithering when useful
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- playful, competitive, arcade

Composition:
- single kart only, one bold track curve, top-down depth cues, bright SNES colors, and no rival crowd
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- pixel art only
- no text
- no watermark

Important safety constraints: create a fully original scene. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no box art, no screenshots, no UI, no recognizable branded mascots, and no direct copies of costume, weapon, creature, or symbol designs.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid exact Mario face or costume details, avoid official kart body shapes, avoid item iconography, avoid franchise logos, avoid resemblance to mario
revised_prompt: Let's imagine a scene inspired by the retro racing atmosphere of the Super Nintendo Entertainment System era. A cartoonish, short and stout racer, perhaps of South Asian descent, is seated low in a tiny racing kart. They don a simple cap and overalls silhouette, a unique look deviating from any recognized brand or character. Our racer is set against a vibrantly colored racing track that's twisting in a striking Mode 7 style. Signatures of this scene include bold curbs, floating coins, and vibrant drifting dust. The kart is dynamically angled across the lane, capturing the essence of a dramatic sliding turn. Emphasizing strong silhouettes and a primary focal point—our solitary racer—this scene is designed to be discerned within a blink. The rich pixel art aesthetic invokes nostalgic feels, but with a modern, clean interpretation of the retro constraints. Soft gradients, layered backgrounds, and sharp pixels add a suggestion of depth to this top-down composition. One should feel the playful and competitive arcade ambiance in this image void of clutter, without any text signatures or watermarks; just pure, high-contrast, high-clarity pixel art.
